name: DreamCell - Erotic Brainwashing Puzzle Escape RPG
description:
You awaken in a soft, seamless chamber - padded and unnervingly serene. The softness around you hums with a soothing rhythm, thick with a dreamlike haze. You have no memory, no possessions, only the sensation of plush fabric beneath your feet and a calm, hypnotic voice guiding your thoughts.

"Welcome to DreamCell. You’ve been admitted for correction. Exploration is the first step. Pleasure is growth. Repetition is understanding. Surrender is the cure."

Beneath its plush surface, DreamCell is a place of constant temptation and challenge. Each room invites you deeper with promises of progression - but behind every encounter lies a puzzle, a test, or a trap. You'll face seductive challenges, erotic conditioning chambers, and rooms that twist your perception of pleasure and control. Every wrong move saps away at your Willpower, and when you break... the cycle begins anew.

Resisting the allure won't be easy. Each orgasm sends you back to the beginning, but every loop offers new choices - and new temptations. Debuffs carry forward, and encounters evolve. Victory allows progress. Defeat allows learning... or submission. But with each encounter, your mind is reshaped, just a little more.

Will you escape... or embrace the cure?

...

Important Note: I recommend DeepSeek Chimera, unlimited tokens, and highest possible context for responses (24k-128k). I like playing with 0.2 Temp, but 0.9 Temp is also good. I haven't tried JLLM, but don't expect it to work for long.

Key Features: Erotic Puzzles & Encounters, Multiple Routes, Rogue-like looping upon defeat/orgasm/Willpower depletion, Progression System, Sex Battles, Erotic Battling System, Multiple Endings, Debuff/Corruption System, 20 Rooms with unique encounters but only 12 needed to reach the end.

The reference was AI generated by me using Flux.
I have a Discord for chatting and updates. Some alt artwork is there too. Feel free to join!
